query:
SELECT ST_AsGeoJSON(t.*, id_column => 'id')::jsonb as "f!: Json<geojson::Feature>"
            FROM (
                SELECT id, name, ST_Transform(geom, 4326) as geom
                FROM app.features
                WHERE collection_id = $1 AND status = 'ACTIVE'
                ORDER BY id
                LIMIT $2 
                ) 
            as t(id, name, geom)
